rationale: Whole-library push-mode harness. Creates real libpng read+info structs, then feeds a small symbolic buffer through png_process_data. Tests Phase-3b under realistic conditions: libpng's setjmp/longjmp error handling, zlib inflate paths, chunk dispatch. Expected: either timeout (path explosion, still valuable because KLEE reached the code) or a confirmed/infeasible verdict on the small buffer.
